rejection_reasons: Patient pages are not clinician guidance.
Medicine and dose content was not mapped.
A tremor presentation does not establish Parkinson disease.
population_applicability: Partial: exact for adults aged over 16 years; the legacy workflow has no age restriction.
setting_applicability: Direct for primary or community recognition and referral, not diagnosis or treatment selection.
UAE_applicability: International NICE guidance requires UAE clinician review and local thyroid-testing, referral, and prescribing pathways.
recency_verification: The current official NG127 adult tremor recommendations, last updated 2023-10-02, were opened on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: NG127 remains the current official NICE suspected-neurological-conditions guideline.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped adult tremor identity, distribution, rest or action context, functional impact, gait, rigidity, bradykinesia, thyroid review, and clinician referral fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports rest or asymmetric tremor, stiffness, slowness, balance or gait difficulty, symmetrical postural tremor, medicine, thyroid and alcohol review, functional impact, head tremor, and clinician-led referral.

unresolved_source_gaps: People aged 16 years or younger are outside the exact source.

Onset, family history, caffeine, alcohol response, weakness, detailed tremor amplitude or frequency, coordination, handwriting, voice or tongue tremor, copper studies, imaging, medicine plans, beta blockers, lifestyle advice, and fixed follow-up remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, treatment selection, medicine dosing, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.

legacy_item_support_mappings.direct_relationship: The exact NICE adult tremor recommendations support these tremor terms, distribution, rest or action context, functional impact, gait, rigidity, bradykinesia, thyroid review, and clinician referral fields.
